CREATE TABLE test_schema.sample_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE PROCEDURE test_schema.test_procedure(IN input_val INT, OUT output_val INT) BEGIN SET output_val = input_val * 2; END;
CREATE PROCEDURE test_schema.complex_procedure() BEGIN CALL sys.settimeout(5000); CALL sys.hot_snapshot(R'/path/to/backup.tar.gz'); END;
CREATE PROCEDURE test_schema.proc_with_multiple_args(IN arg1 INT, IN arg2 VARCHAR(50)) BEGIN INSERT INTO test_schema.sample_table (id, name) VALUES (arg1, arg2); END;
CREATE PROCEDURE test_schema.dynamic_query_procedure(IN table_name VARCHAR(50)) BEGIN PREPARE stmt FROM CONCAT('SELECT * FROM ', table_name); EXECUTE stmt; DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt; END;
CREATE PROCEDURE test_schema.procedure_with_nested_call() BEGIN CALL test_schema.proc_with_multiple_args(3, 'Nested Call'); CALL test_schema.proc_with_multiple_args(4, 'Another Nested Call'); END;
